articles.author: Jagmeet Singh
articles.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs - TechCrunch
articles.description: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.
articles.content: AI has become the smartphone industry’s latest battleground, with manufacturers racing to add AI-powered features to attract mainstream consumers. Vertu is taking a different path. The UK-founded lux… [+13196 chars]

articles.author: Jeanny Yu, Sunny Bangia
articles.title: China’s Powerful New Moonshot AI Model Closes Gap With US Rivals - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Chinese AI pioneer Moonshot unveiled a new model that it claims performs on par with some of the top-tier platforms from OpenAI and Anthropic PBC, the latest sign that the Asian country’s artificial intelligence labs are closing a technology gap with the US.
